provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, iron longsword, straight double-edged steel blade with a shallow fuller running two-thirds of its length, cross-guard of dark wrought iron, leather-wrapped grip with visible cord binding, flat pommel, cool blue-grey metal catching warm highlight on the edge, slight battle wear on the blade surface
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Clean single sword on dark background, good steel material read, warm leather grip, painterly brushwork. Silhouette reads well at 64px.
